tasks.subject: Task 1: Provider typed CapacityError on no-resources mutation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** RunPodProvider.create_instance raises CapacityError (chained from ValueError) when GraphQL mutation errors block contains 'resources to deploy' (case-insensitive). All other mutation errors retain generic ValueError.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py:34 (imports), :501-507 (capacity-error branch)
- Modify: tests/providers/test_runpod.py (+4 tests, near line 319 block)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- pytest.raises(CapacityError) when message contains 'resources to deploy'
- Match case-insensitive
- CapacityError.__cause__ is the underlying ValueError preserving original RunPod message
- Non-capacity mutation errors still raise ValueError
- CapacityError message contains gpu_type via local gpu_type_id variable
- Serverless errors branch (~line 555) UNCHANGED
- Null-pod-id branch (~line 514) UNCHANGED

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod.py -v -k 'capacity_error or non_capacity'

**Steps:** Write 4 failing tests → RED → edit imports + capacity branch → GREEN → full file no regression → pre-commit + commit. See plan §Task 1 for full content.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod.py -v -k 'capacity_error or non_capacity'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RunPodProvider.create_instance raises CapacityError when mutation error message contains resources to deploy (case-insensitive)", "non-capacity mutation errors still raise ValueError", "CapacityError.__cause__ is the underlying ValueError preserving original RunPod message", "CapacityError message names the offer's gpu_type", "serverless and null-pod-id branches unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Orchestrator offer-retry helper + two call-site rewires
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add private _create_with_offer_retry helper in orchestrator.py; wire into both deploy() (~line 636) and _provision_instance_and_build_backend (~line 283). On CapacityError, iterate offers in input order; on exhaustion, raise CapacityError with __cause__ chain. Non-CapacityError exceptions propagate immediately.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py (line 20 add Callable; lines 34-46 add Offer; new helper above line 224; rewire ~272-283 and ~624-636)
- Modify: tests/core/test_orchestrator.py (+5 tests + _OfferRetryProvider(LocalProvider) fake near line 1192)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- deploy() retries create_instance across offers on CapacityError, returns first success
- deploy() iterates offers in exact find_offers-returned input order (discriminating)
- deploy() raises CapacityError('all N offers exhausted; ...') on full exhaustion; __cause__ IS (identity) the last per-offer CapacityError
- deploy() does NOT retry on non-CapacityError exceptions (exactly 1 create call)
- _provision_instance_and_build_backend exhibits identical retry behavior (tested directly with _provision_compute_once patched)
- Layer N destroy-on-error wrap (~lines 638-668) UNCHANGED
- Existing test_deploy_destroys_pod_when_get_instance_raises continues to pass

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator.py tests/providers/test_runpod.py -v

**Steps:** Write 5 failing tests + fake + helper → RED → edit imports → insert _create_with_offer_retry → rewire both call sites → GREEN → typecheck + lint → pre-commit + commit. Depends on Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator.py tests/providers/test_runpod.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deploy() retries create_instance on CapacityError across all offers in input order", "deploy() does NOT retry on non-CapacityError exceptions (exactly one create call)", "deploy() raises CapacityError with 'all N offers exhausted' message and last per-offer CapacityError as __cause__", "_provision_instance_and_build_backend exhibits identical retry behavior", "Layer N destroy-on-error wrap unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Smoke retrofit — typed CapacityError catch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace live smoke's fragile `except ValueError as exc: if "resources to deploy" in str(exc):` (lines ~226-238) with `except CapacityError:`. Keep surrounding `for candidate in offers:` loop intact.

**Files:**
- Modify: tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py (replace string-sniff catch in [phase=create_instance] block)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Smoke catches CapacityError instead of ValueError + substring
- Smoke control flow unchanged (still iterates offers, still pytest.fail on exhaustion)
- pixi run pytest --collect-only reports collected-and-skipped without live env vars
- from kinoforge.core.errors import CapacityError present in imports
- pixi run lint + pixi run typecheck clean

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py --collect-only -v

**Steps:** Locate catch block → replace except clause → add CapacityError import → verify collection → lint + typecheck → pre-commit + commit. Depends on Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py --collect-only -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["smoke catches CapacityError instead of ValueError + substring sniff", "smoke control flow unchanged", "collection green + skip-without-env preserved", "lint + typecheck clean"]}
```
